description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, rectangular layout and a low-pitched, dark gable roof. The exterior walls are clad in light gray siding, contrasted by dark trim and roofing. The property is surrounded by a brown fence and features a spacious, well-maintained lawn with a circular driveway and a central roundabout. The front entrance is sheltered by a small overhang, and the windows are arranged in a linear, asymmetrical pattern along the facade. The structure includes a driveway leading to a garage, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, light gray siding, and a fenced yard featuring a circular driveway and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway, and the prominent overhang above the entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage entrance, driveway, and the elongated side of the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, window arrangement, and the fenced boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the lawn, roundabout, and the side profile of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with linear side and front windows
